title: Memory Clear : Refabricated
description:
Auto System.gc(); and a command;
Chinese!
body:
It can clear your memory to optimize game.
It is more effective for large modpacks and low computers. If you have a lot of memory, this mod will hardly be effective.
You can use JVM Parameters: -XX:+ExplicitGCInvokesConcurrent to reduces lagging when cleaning.
